title: Learn CSS Animation In 15 Minutes
description: Covers all essential animation properties: animation-name, duration, timing-function, delay, iteration-count, direction, fill-mode, and play-state.

title: Learn CSS Animations In 20 Minutes - For Beginners
description: Deep dive into CSS animation properties including animation shorthand, fill modes, and practical animation examples.

title: Timing function tips to improve your css animations
description: Explores animation-timing-function properties including steps() and changing timing within different keyframe intervals.

title: CSS Animation Tutorial #4 - Keyframes
description: Tutorial on CSS animation sub-properties and how they control animation behavior from start to finish.
